steps.title: Separate the two sentences
steps.content: The first clause makes a general claim about increasing airport use. The Austin-Bergstrom sentence is an example, so the transition should start a new sentence with For example followed by a comma.

steps.title: Compare the punctuation
steps.content: Choice A strands for example at the end of the first sentence; Choice C misuses a semicolon after the transition; Choice D creates a comma splice. Choice B correctly ends the first sentence and begins the example with a comma after the transition. The answer is B.
